I’m looking for a reliable virtual assistant who can jump in right away and keep our Instagram DMs flowing smoothly. Your main focus will be replying to incoming messages on our Instagram account, making sure each follower hears back within minutes whenever possible.

What the role involves:
• Monitor our Instagram inbox throughout the day (and, when possible, evenings) so no message sits unanswered for long. 
• Follow the response guidelines I’ll provide to stay on-brand, friendly, and helpful. 
• Flag or escalate any conversations that need my direct input. 
• Keep a simple log of common questions so we can refine future responses and create FAQs.

I value speed, accuracy, and a proactive attitude—if you see a chance to streamline the process or improve engagement, let me know. Familiarity with Instagram’s latest messaging features, quick typing skills, and solid written English are must-haves.

If you can start immediately and maintain near-real-time responsiveness, I’d love to hear how you’ll keep our community engaged.

full_description:
**Project: Icon Illustration for Students Assessment Test**

We need 37 clean, original illustrations for a students screening test i
**What we need:**
- 37 illustrations (objects, animals, vehicles, abstract/conceptual shapes)
- Style: flat design, clean outlines, minimal detail — suitable for children aged 11–15
- Background: white/transparent
- Delivery format: PNG (300 dpi, 500×500 px) + SVG for each illustration
- Colors: black & white 

**Delivery structure (important):**
Each question consists of multiple separate image files:
- The question image: delivered as a standalone file (e.g. [login to view URL])
- Each answer choice: delivered as a separate standalone file (e.g. [login to view URL], [login to view URL], etc.)

Do NOT combine the question and answer choices into one image.

**Important notes:**
- Illustrations will be used in an official government examination
- Must be 100% original (no stock icons, no AI-generated images)
- Each illustration must be immediately recognizable at a glance
- Full ownership/rights transferred upon delivery

**Timeline:** 5 days or less

Please send samples of similar work before we begin.

full_description:
Australian Jockey & Driver Challenge AI Predictor

Project Description

I am looking for an experienced developer or development team to build a professional AI-powered website or Windows application that predicts Australian Jockey Challenge and Driver Challenge markets.

The platform must automatically scrape race meetings, bookmaker markets, calculate AI prices, track live results, and continuously update challenge predictions throughout the day.

Coverage

Thoroughbred Racing

* All Australian race meetings.
* Jockey Challenge markets.

Harness Racing

* All Australian harness meetings.
* Driver Challenge markets.

Points System

For both Jockey and Driver Challenges:

* 1st Place = 3 Points
* 2nd Place = 2 Points
* 3rd Place = 1 Point

Core Features

Daily Data Collection

The system must:

* Automatically collect all Australian race meetings each day.
* Begin scraping from 9:00am Brisbane (AEST).
* Continue updating throughout the day.
* Automatically detect new meetings and market changes.

AI Prediction Engine

The AI model must:

* Predict the most likely winner of each challenge.
* Generate fair odds (AI prices) for every jockey and driver.
* Predict expected final points.
* Rank all participants by winning probability.
* Continuously update predictions as races are completed.

Live Challenge Tracking

Once meetings commence:

* Live leaderboard.
* Current challenge points.
* Rides/drives completed.
* Rides/drives remaining.
* Predicted final points total.
* Updated AI prices after every race.
* Current challenge leader.
* Projected winner.

Bookmaker Comparison

Collect and compare challenge markets from:

Jockey Challenges

* TAB
* Ladbrokes
* Sportsbet
* PointsBet
* TABtouch

Driver Challenges

* Ladbrokes
* Sportsbet
* PointsBet

Display:

* Bookmaker Odds
* AI Odds
* Overlay Percentage
* Value Rating
* Expected Edge

AI Factors

The model should consider:

* Number of rides/drives
* Horse winning chances
* Historical jockey statistics
* Historical driver statistics
* Trainer statistics
* Barrier draws
* Recent form
* Market movements
* Remaining rides/drives
* Current challenge points
* Historical challenge performance

Dashboard

The dashboard should display:

* Today’s Meetings
* Jockey Challenges
* Driver Challenges
* Live Challenges
* Value Opportunities
* Results History
* Profit & Loss Tracking

Technical Requirements

Preferred Technology:

Backend:

* Python

Frontend:

* React, Vue, or similar modern framework

Database:

* PostgreSQL or equivalent

Hosting:

* Cloud-based website preferred

Deliverables

* Full source code
* Database setup
* Data scrapers
* AI prediction engine
* Live tracking dashboard
* Installation documentation
* Ongoing support option

Applicant Requirements

Please provide examples of:

* Sports betting projects
* Racing-related projects
* AI prediction systems
* Web scraping projects
* Live data tracking systems

full_description:
My WordPress site works, but it still feels sluggish. I’d like a specialist to focus on improving raw loading speed, with particular attention on the homepage and key product pages where most visitors land and convert. If you spot additional quick wins elsewhere—say, inside a long-tail blog post—that’s a bonus, yet the brief is firmly anchored on the pages that make the business money.

Here’s what I expect the engagement to cover:

• Run an initial performance audit (Core Web Vitals, GTmetrix, Lighthouse or similar) to create a clear before-and-after benchmark. 
• Optimise code, assets and queries: efficient caching, image compression, script deferral, tidy database tables, and any necessary theme or child-theme tweaks. 
• Review plugins only where they impact speed and suggest lightweight alternatives if stripping them out makes sense. 
• Deliver a stable result that won’t break with the next WordPress, PHP or plugin update.

Acceptance criteria 
1. First-time paint on the homepage and product pages consistently under 2 s on a standard 4G mobile test. 
2. Core Web Vitals in the “good” range for those pages. 
3. Clear hand-over notes: what you changed, why, and how to roll back if needed.

When you reply, highlight your experience on similar WordPress speed projects—real numbers or screenshots help me trust you can replicate those wins here.

full_description:
I am looking for an experienced Amazon Seller Central and Shopify integration expert to help list my Shopify products on Amazon USA and make all products live.

My brand sells men’s polo shirts with multiple designs, sizes, and variants. The products are already created on Shopify, and I need someone who can handle the full Amazon setup correctly, including product listings, variation mapping, inventory sync, pricing sync, and order sync between Amazon and Shopify.

Scope of Work:

Review my Shopify product catalog and prepare it for Amazon listing.
Set up or complete the connection between Shopify and Amazon.
Work with Shopify Marketplace Connect or another approved integration tool if needed.
Create or map Amazon product listings correctly.
Set up parent-child variations for apparel products, including size and design/color variants.
Add product titles, descriptions, bullet points, product identifiers, GTIN/UPC, SKU mapping, images, size information, and other required Amazon fields.
Resolve any Amazon listing errors, missing attributes, category issues, or approval problems.
Make sure all listings are active and ready to sell on Amazon USA.
Set up inventory and price sync from Shopify to Amazon.
Set up Amazon order sync so Amazon orders appear correctly in Shopify.
Test the full workflow from listing to order sync.
Provide a simple guide or explanation so I can manage future products.

Requirements:

Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central USA.
Experience listing apparel/fashion products on Amazon.
Experience with Shopify Marketplace Connect, Codisto, CedCommerce, or similar Shopify-to-Amazon tools.
Knowledge of Amazon variation listings, parent/child SKUs, GTIN/UPC requirements, and listing error resolution.
Must be able to communicate clearly and guide me step by step when needed.
Must not make major changes to my Shopify store without approval.

Important:
I need someone who can actually complete the setup and make the products go live, not only provide general advice. Please apply only if you have done Shopify-to-Amazon product listing and syncing before.

Please include in your proposal:

Your experience with Shopify and Amazon Seller Central.
Which integration app you recommend and why.
Examples of similar projects you completed.
Estimated timeline to complete the setup.
What information or access you will need from me.

The original hosting provider deleted the entire install, and although I still have a backup of the source files and the Oracle + XML data sets, restoring them on a fresh server doesn’t bring the site back online—XOOPS throws errors before the front page even loads.

What I need is straightforward: get the exact same system running again, with no new features added. Once everything is operational, the familiar user-management screens, data-entry forms, and reporting tools should behave just as they did before the deletion.

Key points you’ll tackle:
• Diagnose why the restored backup fails to run on the current environment. 
• Re-install or repair XOOPS core and required modules. 
• Reconnect the application to the existing Oracle database and XML data.

2. Posted material across the three platforms plus Google Business Profile updates 
3. Two printable or digital flyers/newsletters ready to distribute

full_description:
Role Overview
We are looking for pairs of fluent or native English speakers to participate in a remote conversational data collection project. Your goal is to have natural, unscripted video conversations that will help improve AI communication technology.

Only UK, US, Australia, or Canada participants needed for the first phase.

Who Can Apply

1. Direct Participants: You can apply as a pair.
2. Recruiters/Partners: If you have access to a pool of English speakers who are reliable and tech-savvy, you are welcome to apply to help us manage and source these pairs.

Task Requirements

1. Nature of Work: Engage in a natural, unscripted English conversation via video call.
2. Duration: Two Session of 31 to 35 minutes
3. Technical Setup: * Must use a front-facing camera with at least 1080p resolution at 30 FPS.
4. No filters, no background blur, and no video editing.
5. Clean, quiet audio environment is mandatory.
6. You must be able to follow strict lighting and environmental instructions to ensure high-quality data.
7. Must be in UK, US, Australia, or Canada

Payment Details

1. Compensation: Payments are based on the duration of the conversation.
2. Rate: For a full 1-hour session, the total payment is $40.00 (approved combined for the pair of speakers/$20.00 for one speaker) with total for 50 pairs = $2000.
3. Payment Structure: For recruiters, payment is based on commission per task successfully completed and approved. You will have access to a dashboard to track the progress and status of your recruits’ sessions in real-time.

Why Join Us?

1. Flexibility: Work at your own pace.
2. Global Opportunity: Open to English speakers across various time zones.
3. Performance-Based Pay: Consistent work is available for those who consistently meet our audio and video quality standards.

How to Apply

1. If you are a participant: Please reply with your English proficiency level, your location (time zone), and mention if you have a partner ready to record.
2. If you are a recruiter: Please outline your experience in sourcing talent and your strategy for finding reliable English speakers who can meet these technical requirements.

full_description:
Replit Specialist / AI Product Builder for Early-Stage Startup

About the Project

I’m a non-technical founder building an AI-powered platform focused on self-understanding, human connection, and relationship intelligence.

The product is already being built in Replit and has a functioning foundation. I’m looking for a technically strong collaborator who can help accelerate development, solve technical challenges, and turn ideas into working features.

This is not a traditional agency handoff project.

I’m looking for someone who enjoys working directly with founders, solving problems collaboratively, and helping shape an early-stage product.

⸻

Who This Role Is For

You may be a great fit if you:

* Enjoy startup environments
* Like working closely with founders
* Are comfortable with rapid iteration and experimentation
* Have experience building MVPs and early-stage products
* Enjoy AI-assisted development
* Can explain technical concepts in plain English
* Like solving problems rather than simply completing tickets

An interest in AI, psychology, human behaviour, coaching, personal development, community-building, or human connection would be a bonus.

⸻

What You’ll Be Doing

* Working directly with me inside Replit
* Reviewing and improving existing architecture
* Solving technical roadblocks
* Advising on database and scaling decisions
* Debugging and troubleshooting
* Building and refining product features
* Helping translate ideas into practical implementation
* Recommending smarter and simpler ways to achieve product goals

⸻

Technical Requirements

Ideal experience includes:

* Strong Replit experience
* Experience with AI coding tools
* Full-stack web application development
* Database design and architecture
* API integrations
* Startup or MVP development experience
* Debugging and optimisation

Experience working on AI-powered products would be advantageous.

⸻

Important

The product already exists and is actively being developed.

I am not looking for a complete rebuild.

The initial engagement will focus on:

* Reviewing the current implementation
* Identifying opportunities for improvement
* Solving immediate technical challenges
* Helping create a practical roadmap for future development

The right person may become a longer-term collaborator as the product evolves.

⸻

Working Style

I’m heavily involved in product vision, user experience, customer insight, and product direction.

I’m looking for someone who enjoys collaborative product creation and is comfortable working with a non-technical founder.

Strong communication, initiative, curiosity, and a problem-solving mindset are extremely important.

⸻

To Apply

Please answer the following:

1. What products have you built that you’re most proud of?
2. What experience do you have with Replit?
3. Which AI coding tools do you regularly use?
4. Have you worked with non-technical founders before?
5. What is the most interesting AI-assisted product you’ve built, and what role did AI play in the development process?
6. Why does this project interest you?
7. What is your hourly rate?

Please include links, screenshots, demos, GitHub repositories, or portfolio examples where possible.

Applications that do not answer the above questions may not be considered.

⸻

Engagement Details

Initial duration: 1–3 months

Time commitment: Less than 10 hours per week

Location: Remote

Budget: Flexible depending on experience and fit

The priority is finding the right person rather than simply the lowest hourly rate.

We are looking for a creative and versatile freelance content creator who can handle both Script Writing and Voice Over for our Telugu 2D Animation YouTube Channel. This is a long-term opportunity for the right candidate.

Niche: Must be able to write engaging Moral Stories and King/Historical Stories , Family stories .

full_description:
# Advanced Excel Study Planner & Performance Dashboard (RRB PO, SBI PO, SSC)

## Project Overview

I need a professional, full-featured study-planning workspace built entirely in Microsoft Excel (Excel 2016+ compatible) for competitive exam preparation, specifically RRB PO, SBI PO, IBPS PO, SSC CGL, SSC CHSL, and similar aptitude-based examinations.

The workbook should function as a complete planning, tracking, and performance-management system, allowing me to create fully customizable study schedules (daily, weekly, monthly, or hour-based), monitor progress automatically, analyze mock-test performance, and identify weak areas through interactive dashboards.

The final deliverable should be clean, professional, optimized for performance, and suitable for long-term use without requiring VBA macros.

---

## Core Requirements

### 1. Smart Dashboard (Landing Page)

When the workbook opens, a centralized dashboard should immediately display:

* Total study hours completed
* Total study hours remaining
* Topics completed vs pending
* Subject-wise completion percentage
* Mock tests attempted vs planned
* Weekly and monthly study consistency
* Overall preparation readiness score
* Upcoming exam countdowns

Dashboard metrics must update automatically whenever new data is entered.

---

### 2. Customizable Study Planner

The planner should support:

* Daily study schedules
* Weekly study schedules
* Monthly study schedules
* Flexible block-hour planning
* Subject prioritization
* Topic-level planning
* Revision scheduling
* Backlog management

Users must be able to modify schedules without affecting formulas or dashboard functionality.

---

### 3. KPI Tracking System

The dashboard should track:

#### Study KPIs

* Planned Hours
* Completed Hours
* Remaining Hours
* Completion %
* Productivity Score

#### Topic KPIs

* Topics Planned
* Topics Completed
* Topics Pending
* Revision Coverage %

#### Test KPIs

* Mock Tests Planned
* Mock Tests Completed
* Average Score
* Best Score
* Improvement Trend

Visual KPI cards should clearly indicate status using color coding.

---

### 4. Interactive Data Visualization

Include dynamic charts that update automatically:

* Subject-wise progress charts
* Weekly study trend graphs
* Monthly performance trends
* Mock-test score progression
* Accuracy trend charts
* Time-investment analysis
* Goal completion charts

Preferred chart types:

* Pivot Charts
* Dynamic Line Charts
* Bar Charts
* Donut Charts
* Progress Rings

---

### 5. Performance Visualization

Create visual indicators such as:

* Progress bars
* Heat maps
* Readiness meters
* Weak-topic indicators
* Subject mastery scorecards
* Goal achievement trackers

Users should be able to identify weak subjects instantly.

---

### 6. Mock-Test Analytics Engine

Users should be able to paste raw mock-test data and instantly receive:

#### Accuracy Analysis

* Overall Accuracy %
* Section-wise Accuracy %
* Wrong Answer Rate

* Questions Attempted Per Minute
* Average Time Per Question

* Score Trend

* Weakest Section

#### Benchmarking

* Percentile Trend
* Ranking Trend
* Readiness Index

---

### 7. Goal Tracking & Alerts

Users should be able to set custom goals such as:

* Daily study hours
* Weekly targets
* Monthly completion targets
* Mock-test targets

The workbook should generate visual alerts when performance falls below defined thresholds.

Examples:

* Less than 80% weekly target achieved
* Revision backlog exceeds limit
* Mock-test frequency drops below goal

---

### 8. Live Exam Countdown

* RRB PO

* SSC CHSL

Display:

* Days Remaining
* Weeks Remaining

Countdowns should update automatically based on the system date.

---

### 9. Automation & User Experience

Use modern Excel features where appropriate:

* Power Query
* Pivot Tables
* Pivot Charts
* Structured Tables
* Dynamic Named Ranges
* Data Validation
* Conditional Formatting
* Slicers
* Timeline Filters

Avoid VBA unless absolutely necessary.

No macro security warnings should appear.

---

### 10. Protection & Usability

Requirements:

* Protect formula cells from accidental edits
* Keep all source data editable
* No hidden worksheets
* No VBA passwords
* Fully transparent workbook structure
* Easy future customization

---

### 11. Documentation Sheet

Include a dedicated "How to Use" worksheet containing:

* Workbook overview
* Data-entry instructions
* Explanation of all dashboards
* KPI definitions
* Chart descriptions
* Customization guide

The workbook should be understandable without additional training.

full_description:
Role Overview:

We are conducting a large-scale global data collection project to support digital physical therapy and movement analysis development. We are looking for 50 participants who meet specific physical criteria to record short, guided exercise movements. We are also seeking Recruitment Partners to help us source and manage these contributors.

For Participants:

1. Task: Record 14 short, unedited, guided exercise videos.
2. Estimated Time: ~45 minutes to complete the full 14-video set.
3. Physical Criteria (Women): Must have a BMI greater than 30 (Obese to Extremely Obese). Age 50+
4.. Physical Criteria (Men): Must have a BMI less than 30. Age 50+
5. Setup: Must have a smartphone and a stable setup (tripod, table, or shelf).
6. Technical: Minimum 720p resolution at 30 FPS.
7. Guidelines: Must be able to perform light-to-moderate exercises. Full body must remain visible in the frame at all times. No filters, no editing, and no background blur allowed.
8. Compensation: $18.00 per completed and approved 14-video set. For a total of 50 participants = $900.

For Recruiters:

1. Objective: Source and onboard participants who meet the BMI and technical criteria.
2. Proficiency: Experienced in sourcing required candidates.
3. Commission: Performance-based. You earn for every 14-video task completed and approved by your recruits. Total pay out remains 50 participants x $18 per 14-videos = $900.
4. Transparency: You will have access to a dashboard to track the progress and approval status of all your recruited participants in real-time.

Immediate Participants Requirements:

1. Caucasian, Male, Age 50+, BMI < 30
2. Caucasian, Female, Age 50+, BMI > 30
3. Latin/Hispanic, Male, Age 50+, BMI < 30
4. Latin/Hispanic, Male, Age 50+, BMI > 30

How to Join:

1. Interested in participating? Reply with your Age, Location, BMI (or confirmation that you meet the requirement), and confirmation that you have a stable way to mount your smartphone.
2. Interested in recruiting? Reply with your experience in sourcing and your strategy for finding qualified contributors.

full_description:
I run several communities that share time-sensitive Amazon promo codes and I’m ready to replace my manual copy-and-paste routine with a single, reliable bot.

Scope of work 
• One consolidated automation that connects to BOTH Discord and Telegram. 
• On Telegram it must: 
 – post each new promo code in the channel immediately, 
 – maintain simple subscription tiers (free vs premium) so only eligible users see premium codes, 
 – push optional reminders/alerts for expiring deals. 
• On Discord it must: 
 – post the same promo codes in a chosen text channel, 
 – assign or remove server roles that mirror those Telegram tiers, 
 – send role-based notifications about new or expiring deals. 

Key expectations 
• Single dashboard or config file where I can drop fresh promo codes (CSV, Google Sheet, or similar) and let the bot handle distribution. 
• Rate-limit handling so neither platform flags the account. 
• Clean logging of every post, role change, and notification.

• Environment variables for all tokens/keys; no hard-coding. 

Deliverables 
1. Source code with clear README. 
2. Step-by-step deployment guide (Linux VPS). 
3. A brief Loom or screen-share demo showing the bot in action on both platforms. 

Acceptance criteria 
The job is complete when I can: 
• add a promo code to the input file, 
• watch it appear instantly in both my Telegram and Discord channels, properly restricted to the right user tier/role, 
• and receive a confirmation log entry— all without touching the platforms manually.

Feel free to suggest improvements or libraries that could make the build more robust; I value maintainability over quick hacks.

full_description:
Urgent - Australian Fire Safety Website Content Writer (51 Pages, 2 Websites)

---

PROJECT OVERVIEW

We are a digital agency looking for an experienced, reliable content writer to write complete website content for two Australian fire safety websites based in Sydney, NSW.

This is a single, complete project covering both websites — 51 pages in total. We need someone who can start immediately and deliver quality work on time. Full project details, website URLs, and research materials will be shared privately after hire.

Website 1 (~23 pages)
Focus: Fire evacuation planning, procedure manuals, evacuation diagrams, and compliance documentation

Website 2 (~28 pages)
Focus: Fire extinguisher products, installation, testing & certification, and fire safety training

Deadline:
- Phase 1 (priority pages, both sites): 15 June 2026
- Phase 2 (all remaining pages): 22 June 2026

---

FULL PAGE LIST

WEBSITE 1 (~23 pages)

Top-Level Pages:
- Home
- About Us
- Services (parent landing page)
- Fire Evacuation Plan
- Fire Evacuation Procedure / Procedure Manuals
- Evacuation Diagrams
- Fire Warden Training
- Fire Extinguisher Training
- Industries We Serve (parent landing page)
- Aged Care & Healthcare Facilities
- Schools & Childcare Centres
- Commercial & Office Buildings
- Strata & Residential Buildings
- Warehouses & Industrial Sites
- Compliance & Legislation hub (AS 3745, BCA, WHS)
- Resources / Blog (page shell)
- FAQs
- Contact Us
- Request a Quote
- Service Locations (NSW suburbs & service areas)

Utility / Legal Pages:
- Privacy Policy
- Terms & Conditions
- Cookie Notice
- Thank You / Form Confirmation
- 404 Error Page

WEBSITE 2 (~28 pages)

Top-Level Pages:
- Home
- About Us
- Fire Extinguishers (parent landing page)
- CO2 Fire Extinguisher
- Dry Chemical (ABE Powder) Fire Extinguisher
- Wet Chemical Fire Extinguisher
- Water Fire Extinguisher
- Foam Fire Extinguisher
- Fire Hose Reels
- Fire Blankets
- Services (parent landing page)
- Fire Extinguisher Installation
- Fire Compliance Testing
- Servicing & Maintenance
- Annual Fire Safety Statement (AFSS)
- Fire Safety Training (parent landing page)
- Fire Warden Training in Sydney
- Fire Extinguisher Training in Sydney
- Fire Evacuation Drill in Sydney
- Service Areas / Service Locations
- Resources / Blog (page shell)
- FAQs
- Contact Us
- Request a Quote / Book a Service

Utility / Legal Pages:
- Privacy Policy
- Terms & Conditions
- Cookie Notice
- Thank You / Form Confirmation
- 404 Error Page

---

ABOUT THE CLIENT

- Established Sydney-based fire safety company with 15+ years in operation
- Services small to medium buildings across the Sydney metro area and parts of NSW
- Team includes Accredited Practitioners, Fire Engineers, and Fire Designers
- Guides clients through Development Application (DA) and council compliance processes end-to-end
- Key target sectors: childcare centres, schools, warehouses, factories, offices, hotels, strata/apartment buildings, construction companies, and builders
- Full client details, brand information, and research materials provided after hire

---

COMPLIANCE & STANDARDS TO REFERENCE

- AS 1851 — routine service of fire protection systems
- AS 2444-2001 — portable fire extinguishers and fire blankets
- AS 3745-2010 — evacuation diagrams and emergency procedure manuals
- NCC 2022 E1D14
- AFSS — Annual Fire Safety Statement
- BCA / NCC, WHS

---

TARGET KEYWORDS (sample — full list provided after hire)

Website 1:
Evacuation Diagrams Sydney, Emergency Evacuation Plans Sydney, AS3745 Evacuation Diagrams, Fire Evacuation Plans, Emergency Management Plans, Emergency Procedure Manuals, Fire Warden Training, Workplace Evacuation Plans, Fire Safety Diagrams

Website 2:
Fire Extinguisher Service Sydney, Fire Extinguisher Testing Sydney, Fire Extinguisher Maintenance Sydney, Fire Extinguisher Installation, AS1851 Fire Extinguisher Maintenance, Annual Fire Safety Statement, Fire Extinguisher Compliance, Fire Warden Training Sydney, Fire Safety Compliance Sydney

---

COMPETITOR RESEARCH

A list of competitor websites for reference and research will be provided privately after hire.

---

CONTENT REQUIREMENTS

1. Language: Australian English throughout — non-negotiable
2. Tone: Professional and authoritative for compliance/standards content; friendly and approachable for customer-facing pages
3. Structure: Every page must have a clear H1, relevant H2s, H3s where needed, and at least one strong CTA (e.g. "Request a Free Quote", "Book a Service", "Contact Us Today")
4. SEO: Natural keyword integration based on the provided keyword list; no keyword stuffing
5. Originality: 100% original, human-written content — no AI generation, no plagiarism, no copying or close paraphrasing from any existing source. The end client will verify this.
6. Internal linking: Flag natural internal linking opportunities within the content
7. Word counts (approximate):
 - Home pages: 800–1,000 words
 - Service / product pages: 600–800 words
 - Sub-service / product detail pages: 500–700 words
 - Industry pages: 500–600 words
 - FAQs, Contact, Quote pages: 300–500 words
 - Utility / legal pages: standard templated length
8. Delivery format: Microsoft Word (.docx), one file per page, clearly named

---

IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Proven experience writing website content for Australian businesses
- Experience in fire safety, construction, trades, compliance, or technical industries is a strong advantage
- Comfortable writing for both technical audiences (compliance managers, engineers) and general audiences (small business owners, school principals)
- Reliable communicator who provides progress updates proactively
- Available to start immediately and fully committed to the June deadlines
- Portfolio or writing samples required — preferably for Australian clients or technical/trades industries

---

DELIVERY SCHEDULE

Phase 1 — Priority pages from both sites: by 15 June 2026
Phase 2 — All remaining pages: by 22 June 2026

---

HOW TO APPLY

Please include in your proposal:
1. Two or three samples of website content you have written, preferably for Australian businesses or technical/trades industries
2. Confirmation that you can start immediately
3. Your proposed fixed price for the full 51-page project
4. An honest assessment of whether you can meet the 15 June Phase 1 deadline

We are a straightforward agency to work with — clear briefs, prompt communication, and we pay on time. Full project details will be shared with the selected candidate under a confidentiality agreement.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Your role will be to:

• Provide a ballpark timeline and resource estimate so I can plan the next steps confidently. 

If you have a strong track record taking vague concepts and turning them into clear, actionable plans, I’d love to review your approach and a sample of a similar brief you’ve delivered before.

full_description:
I am gearing up for an Amazon FBA pre-launch and need a reliable, on-the-ground sourcing partner in China. Your core mission will be to locate trustworthy manufacturers, benchmark and negotiate pricing, safeguard product quality, and steer everything smoothly to my prep center so the inventory is FBA-ready.

Scope of work 
• Finding suppliers – create a vetted shortlist (MOQ, lead time, sample cost, factory certificates). 
• Negotiations & price benchmarking – gain best-in-class quotes and document concessions. 
• Quality control – arrange inspections, photo/video reports, and pre-shipment checks that match Amazon standards. 
• Logistics coordination – book freight, confirm INCO terms, generate commercial docs, and track until delivered.

Product range 
I’m launching a mixed line that spans electronics, home goods, and possibly apparel. Flexibility to jump between categories and understand their specific compliance needs is essential.

Acceptance criteria 
1. At least three qualified suppliers per item with full quotation sheets. 
2. Signed negotiation summary showing unit cost, tooling, and payment terms. 
3. Pass/fail inspection report and defect pictures for each production run. 
4. Door-to-door shipping plan with timeline, tracking, and landed cost breakdown.

If you know your way around Alibaba, 1688, WeChat, QC firms like SGS, and are comfortable communicating in both English and Mandarin, let’s talk and get this launch moving.

title_raw: مطور ألعاب محترف (Unity) لتعديل لعبة طاولة (Backgammon 3D)
title_clean: مطور العاب محترف unity لتعديل لعبه طاوله backgammon 3d عنوان المشروع مطور العاب محترف unity لتعديل لعبه طاوله backgammon
cleaned_text: مطور العاب محترف unity لتعديل لعبه طاوله backgammon 3d عنوان المشروع مطور العاب محترف unity لتعديل لعبه طاوله backgammon 3d وربطها بسيرفر اونلاين وبناء نظام بطولات.تفاصيل المشروع السلام عليكم،ابحث مطور العاب محترف وخبير محرك unity 3d للعمل علي مشروع لعبه طاوله backgammon موجهه لاسواق الشرق الاوسط، اسيا، واوروبا انا امتلك الكود المصدري الاساسي للعبه unity project والمطلوب تطوير اللعبه بالكامل لتصبح لعبه جماعيه احترافيه منافسه.المهام المطلوبه بدقه نظام الاونلاين وتعدد اللاعبين multiplayer backend ربط اللعبه بسيرفر خارجي قوي ومستقر photon engine او unity netcode لضمان لعب مباشر وسلس real-time matchmaking لاعبين دول مختلفه بدون تعليق lag 1.1.2، 1.1.10 نظام غرف وبطولات tournaments racing برمجه نظام تحديات وسباقات اسبوعيه، انشاء لوحه صداره للمتصدرين leaderboard لتوزيع الجوايز تلقاييا.مراحل ومستويات الصعوبه stages ai اضافه طور فردي يحتوي علي مستويات صعوبه متعدده للذكاء الاصطناعي، ونظام مراحل تغيير شكل الطاوله والرهان مستوي اللاعب تعديل الواجهات reskin ui ux تغيير التصاميم والرسوميات الحاليه لتصبح طابع شرقي وعصري فخم ساقوم بتوفير التصاميم او الاتفاق عليها دعم اللغات وعملات اللعبه اضافه دعم كامل للغات العربيه، الانجليزيه، التركيه، الفارسيه ربط نظام شحن وشراء العملات والجواهر داخل اللعبه in-app purchases الشروط المطلوبه المطور خبره سابقه ومثبته بناء العاب اونلاين متعدده اللاعبين multiplayer games 1.1.2، 1.2.1 تقديم نماذج لاعمال سابقه شبيهه العاب طاوله، لودو، او العاب ورق اونلاين تسليم الكود المصدري نظيفا ومنظما انتهاء العمل نقل الملكيه الفكريه بالكامل لي.يرجي تقديم عرضك شاملا التكلفه الماديه المتوقعه والوقت المطلوب للانجاز تصميم 3d برمجه العاب الجوال تطوير الالعاب تصميم العاب برمجه unknown
full_description: عنوان المشروع:مطور ألعاب محترف (Unity) لتعديل لعبة طاولة (Backgammon 3D) وربطها بسيرفر أونلاين وبناء نظام بطولات.تفاصيل المشروع:السلام عليكم،أبحث عن مطور ألعاب محترف وخبير في محرك (Unity 3D) للعمل على مشروع لعبة طاولة (Backgammon) موجهة لأسواق الشرق الأوسط، آسيا، وأوروبا. أنا أمتلك الكود المصدري الأساسي للعبة (Unity Project)، والمطلوب هو تطوير اللعبة بالكامل لتصبح لعبة جماعية احترافية منافسة.المهام المطلوبة بدقة:نظام الأونلاين وتعدد اللاعبين (Multiplayer Backend): ربط اللعبة بسيرفر خارجي قوي ومستقر (مثل Photon Engine أو Unity Netcode) لضمان لعب مباشر وسلس (Real-time Matchmaking) بين لاعبين من دول مختلفة بدون تعليق (Lag) [1.1.2، 1.1.10].نظام غرف وبطولات (Tournaments & Racing): برمجة نظام تحديات وسباقات أسبوعية، مع إنشاء لوحة صدارة للمتصدرين (Leaderboard) لتوزيع الجوائز تلقائياً.مراحل ومستويات الصعوبة (Stages & AI): إضافة طور فردي يحتوي على مستويات صعوبة متعددة للذكاء الاصطناعي، ونظام مراحل (تغيير شكل الطاولة والرهان حسب مستوى اللاعب).تعديل الواجهات (Reskin & UI/UX): تغيير التصاميم والرسوميات الحالية لتصبح ذات طابع شرقي وعصري فخم (سأقوم بتوفير التصاميم أو الاتفاق عليها).دعم اللغات وعملات اللعبة: إضافة دعم كامل للغات (العربية، الإنجليزية، التركية، الفارسية)، مع ربط نظام شحن وشراء العملات والجواهر داخل اللعبة (In-App Purchases).الشروط المطلوبة في المطور:خبرة سابقة ومثبتة في بناء ألعاب أونلاين متعددة اللاعبين (Multiplayer Games) [1.1.2، 1.2.1].تقديم نماذج لأعمال سابقة شبيهة (ألعاب طاولة، لودو، أو ألعاب ورق أونلاين).تسليم الكود المصدري نظيفاً ومنظماً بعد انتهاء العمل مع نقل الملكية الفكرية بالكامل لي.يرجى تقديم عرضك شاملاً التكلفة المادية المتوقعة والوقت المطلوب للإنجاز.

cleaned_text: مبرمج لتركيب سكريبت منيو الكتروني جاهز بنظام saas متعدد المطاعم السلام عليكم، ابحث مبرمج محترف لتركيب واعداد سكريبت جاهز يدعم نظام المنصات متعدده المطاعم saas multi-restaurant تفاصيل العمل والشروط الادوات ساقوم بشراء السكريبت بنفسي موقع codecanyon، ساقوم بحجز الاستضافه vps والدومين ببطاقتي الخاصه وتجهيز الحسابات، والمستقل يتكفل باي مدفوعات خارجيه.المطلوب المستقل رفع ملفات السكريبت الجاهز علي الاستضافه، ربط قواعد البيانات، وتفعيل النظام بالكامل ليعمل بشكل صحيح كالمثال الرسمي للسكريبت اي تعديلات برمجيه خاصه او بناء الصفر اللغات ضبط اللغات المتوفره السكريبت العربيه، الانجليزيه، الهولنديه التوثيق ونقل الملكيه يشترط تسجيل مقاطع فيديو قصيره لشرح لوحه التحكم، ونقل كافه الصلاحيات وبيانات الدخول لبريدي الشخصي الانتهاء.الميزانيه 200 كاجر صافي ليد المبرمج مقابل التركيب والتهييه فقط تطوير البرمجيات برمجه مواقع برمجه قواعد البيانات برمجه التطبيقات برمجه هندسه البرمجيات flutter برمجه تطبيقات ايفون unknown
full_description: السلام عليكم، أبحث عن مبرمج محترف لتركيب وإعداد سكريبت جاهز يدعم نظام المنصات متعددة المطاعم (SaaS / Multi-Restaurant).تفاصيل العمل والشروط:الأدوات: سأقوم بشراء السكريبت بنفسي من موقع CodeCanyon، كما سأقوم بحجز الاستضافة (VPS) والدومين ببطاقتي الخاصة وتجهيز الحسابات، والمستقل لن يتكفل بأي مدفوعات خارجية.المطلوب من المستقل: رفع ملفات السكريبت الجاهز على الاستضافة، ربط قواعد البيانات، وتفعيل النظام بالكامل ليعمل بشكل صحيح كالمثال الرسمي للسكريبت (دون أي تعديلات برمجية خاصة أو بناء من الصفر).اللغات: ضبط اللغات المتوفرة في السكريبت (العربية، الإنجليزية، الهولندية).التوثيق ونقل الملكية: يشترط تسجيل مقاطع فيديو قصيرة لشرح لوحة التحكم، ونقل كافة الصلاحيات وبيانات الدخول لبريدي الشخصي عند الانتهاء.الميزانية: 200 دولار كأجر صافي ليد المبرمج مقابل التركيب والتهيئة فقط.
